a.xlink:title: Resolves names and fully qualify them in the AST (prefixing them with the package they are from)
Lots of utilities about string, filesystem and more.
Host the declaration of all the ArkScript builtins.
AST node used by the parser, optimizer and compiler.
Handle scope resolution at compile time.
Defines position utilities (for text in a file) for the parser, formatter, diagnostics.
Static scopes (for functions, loops) and namespace scopes (for packages) definitions,...
Default value type handled by the virtual machine.
Subtype of the value type, handling closures.
Subtype of the value, capable of handling any C++ type.
